desc: In src/lexer.js, the parseLine(line) scanner handles quoted CSV fields but does not handle RFC-4180 escaped double-quotes ("" inside a quoted field represents a literal "). It closes the field on the first quote of the pair, mis-splitting the rest of the line. Fix parseLine() in src/lexer.js so that inside a quoted field, a " immediately followed by another " appends a single literal " and advances past both characters (a lookahead branch), so that tests/csvlite.test.ts passes.
